components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA — login submit, checkout confirm.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 8px 16px; background: #1677ff; color: #ffffff; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4096ff; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1677ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 32px; padding: 4px 15px; background: transparent; color: #1677ff; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #1677ff; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #4096ff; border-color: #4096ff; background: #e6f4ff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1677ff; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost-icon { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Home hero search — large, with prefix icon area.
components.html: ⌕
components.css: .ds-search-wrap { display: flex; align-items: stretch; max-width: 480px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d9d9d9; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-search-wrap:focus-within { border-color: #1677ff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(22, 119, 255, 0.1); } .ds-search-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 12px; color: #666666; font-size: 16px; } .ds-search-input { flex: 1; border: none; outline: none; padding: 8px 0; font-size: 16px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; color: #1f1f1f; background: transparent; } .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: #666666; } .ds-search-btn { border: none; background: #1677ff; color: #ffffff; padding: 0 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-search-btn:hover { background: #4096ff; }

components.name: Goods Card
components.description: Home grid item — image, title, price, seller.
components.html:
📷

二手高等数学教材 九成新

¥25zhang_san
components.css: .ds-goods-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; box-shadow: none; } .ds-goods-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .ds-goods-cover { aspect-ratio: 1; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e6f4ff 0%, #f0f5ff 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-goods-placeholder { font-size: 48px; color: #91caff; opacity: 0.8; } .ds-goods-body { padding: 12px 16px 16px; } .ds-goods-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #1f1f1f; line-height: 1.4; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-goods-meta { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .ds-goods-price { color: #ff4d4f; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-goods-seller { color: #666666; font-size: 12px; }

components.name: Nav Brand
components.description: Header brand lockup — icon + 校园二手.
components.html: 🛒校园二手
components.css: .ds-nav-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-brand-icon { font-size: 24px; color: #1677ff; line-height: 1; } .ds-nav-brand-text { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #1f1f1f; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; } .ds-nav-brand:hover .ds-nav-brand-text { color: #1677ff; }

components.name: Status Tag
components.css: .ds-tag-sold { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 12px; color: #1f1f1f; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92); border: 1px solid #f0f0f0; border-radius: 4px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; }

components.name: Hero Banner
components.description: Home page search hero — one gradient band per page.
components.html:
发现校园好物

二手书籍、数码、生活用品，应有尽有
components.css: .ds-hero { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1677ff, #4096ff); border-radius: 16px; padding: 40px; color: #ffffff; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; } .ds-hero-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; color: #ffffff; } .ds-hero-sub { margin: 0 0 20px; font-size: 16px; opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Chat Bubble (Sent)
components.description: User message bubble in chat view.
components.css: .ds-chat-sent { display: inline-block; max-width: 70%; padding: 10px 14px; background: #1677ff; color: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; }

narrative.overview: This system treats the app as a digital campus bulletin board — upgraded for mobile, but still local, approachable, and full of discovery. Like 闲鱼's familiar second-hand rhythm, scoped to one school community. Surfaces are friendly and efficient: rounded cards, clear prices, obvious next actions.
keyCharacteristics: Campus-local trust — seller names, order status, and chat are first-class
Friendly & efficient — Ant Design Vue with 12px card radius and hover lift
Hybrid elevation — sticky header shadow; cards lift on hover
Warm evolution path — blue is transitional toward Warm Campus Teal
Energy without noise — one hero gradient per page maximum

rules.name: The Warm Campus Teal Rule
rules.body: The primary accent is transitioning from Ant Design blue (#1677ff) toward a warmer teal-green that reads campus not enterprise SaaS.

rules.name: The One Promo Surface Rule
rules.body: Full-width gradient hero banners appear once per page. No countdown timers, no screaming red sale strips.

rules.name: The Chinese-First Rule
rules.body: All UI copy is Chinese. Never below 16px for primary interactive labels on mobile.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Touch Rule
rules.body: Surfaces do not carry shadow at rest except the header. Depth appears on hover, focus, or modal elevation.

dos: Do use --bg-page (#f0f2f5) behind white content surfaces for clear tonal layering.
Do show seller username and price on every goods card — trust through clarity.
Do keep primary flows reachable within the top nav and obvious CTAs.
Do use hover lift on interactive cards only.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion when adding animations.
donts: Don't use 廉价电商风: full-screen promotions, screaming red/yellow sale banners, countdown timers, fake urgency, cluttered category grids.
Don't ship Generic Ant Design defaults as the final identity.
Don't use SaaS marketing clichés: hero metrics, gradient text, glass cards, numbered section eyebrows.
Don't add side-stripe borders on cards or alerts.
Don't use Deal Red as large background fills.
Don't add gradient hero bands to every page.
